title: Khara are hiring 30 news soon maybe
display_title: Khara are hiring 30 news soon maybe
wikitext:
[]: Khara are hiring -- 3.0 news soon maybe? Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sun Dec 12, 2010 4:51 am Bit off topic but the Khara website just listed a RECRUIT page. They're hiring, which means they have to be hard at work on something. If I remember correctly they started hiring people right before serious information about 2.0 was released.

[]: Post by Reichu » Sun Dec 12, 2010 5:21 am Would it have been THAT hard to dig up the most recent Q thread? (As in, thread actually about Q, not with "Q" in the subject.) Now there's gonna be a tangent, and somebody's gonna have to split it out... I HATE YOU AND PUPPIES, AND RAINBOWS, AND MOE BLOBS...

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Dec 12, 2010 5:48 am Split into separate thread

[]: Post by Kendrix » Sun Dec 12, 2010 6:49 am YEAH! FINALLY! CANT WAIT FOR TRAILERS! So perhaps the rumors about Anno getting no budget restrictions are true! Shinji: Finally! Rei and I have sort of run out of things to do here in unit 01... A-And not in the p-perwerted way! *instinctively ducs in fear of violent Asuka kick**needs a second to remembver that she's in hospital* H-However. Me and Rei would like to uh, get down to business, but uh, my Mom is in here as well and it'd be really, really embarassedv if she caught us in flagranti....

[]: Post by Naminator » Sun Dec 12, 2010 7:33 am Sounds good. I hope all the new muscle will speed things up, or at the very least make sure that the next two movies are longer. Can't wait to see how things are going to turn out.

[]: Post by Xard » Sun Dec 12, 2010 8:47 am Now we just need somebody to translate for us what kind of folk they're hiring exactly

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Dec 12, 2010 9:27 am Good news to wake up to. Look forward to hearing more hopefully and eventually. So I assume Kara already worked on drafts (kinda like with 2.0 stuffs) and now they "just" need to finalize storyboards and/or Anno changing ideas last-minute.

[]: Post by Azathoth » Sun Dec 12, 2010 11:32 am Xard wrote: Now we just need somebody to translate for us what kind of folk they're hiring exactly

[]: Post by Xard » Sun Dec 12, 2010 12:46 pm This means they're already in animation phase. Awesome.

[]: Now we only have to wait several more long years! :D Post by Killer Bee » Sun Dec 12, 2010 12:57 pm Xard wrote: This means they're already in animation phase. Awesome.

[]: Post by shinji_ryoji_89 » Sun Dec 12, 2010 1:33 pm So, does this mean that the movie still has a way to go before being finished?

[]: Post by Azathoth » Sun Dec 12, 2010 1:36 pm shinji_ryoji_89 wrote: So, does this mean that the movie still has a way to go before being finished?

[]: Post by shinji_ryoji_89 » Sun Dec 12, 2010 1:43 pm Azathoth wrote: If it was totally finished they'd certainly have released a trailer already, given the enormous goddamn hype built up on Q. I wouldn't expect a 2011 release, but we ought to have at least a trailer sometime next year if they've got enough done to start looking at the CG.

[]: Post by Clover » Sun Dec 12, 2010 1:48 pm I recall a quote from a while ago that said that the next two movies would be made in a smaller time frame. Despite the gap between 2.0 and now, I am confident in a 2011 release.

[]: Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sun Dec 12, 2010 1:57 pm Honestly I've heard nothing that makes me think a 2011 release is out of the question. Most likely our lack of information concerning 3.0 could mean the film is going to be a late Summer release as opposed to an early(ish) one like 2.0 was. Think of a release date more around late August or September. But nothing's certain yet. Just that they're hiring new crew members with focus on people who are skilled in 3DCG effects.

[]: Post by beaverteeth92 » Sun Dec 12, 2010 2:49 pm It might just be that they don't want to say anything until there's something to show.

[]: Post by cd603 » Sun Dec 12, 2010 2:57 pm I still believe in a Nov 2011 release...and then hopefully 4.0 in July 2012

[]: Post by Xard » Sun Dec 12, 2010 3:28 pm Azathoth wrote: If it was totally finished they'd certainly have released a trailer already, given the enormous goddamn hype built up on Q. I wouldn't expect a 2011 release, but we ought to have at least a trailer sometime next year if they've got enough done to start looking at the CG.

[]: Though the hype machine for 3.0 might be different I suppose Post by Nonoriri » Sun Dec 12, 2010 3:54 pm Xard wrote: The next summer is entirely feasible and quite likely. Second Macross Frontier Film got its animation production started this fall three or so months ago. Yet the film is coming out in February 2011 It's by no means unfeasible.

[]: Re: Though the hype machine for 3.0 might be different I sup Post by Xard » Sun Dec 12, 2010 5:00 pm Nonoriri wrote: I'd base a probable release when we get the first real trailer for 3.0 myself.
